# Vendor bundles

`sql-asm.js` is a vendored build of [sql.js](https://github.com/sql-js/sql.js) (MIT). It lets Cadence run SQLite on shared hosts where `better-sqlite3` native binaries and npm `sql.js` installs are unavailable. Do not edit by hand — replace from `node_modules/sql.js/dist/sql-asm.js` when upgrading sql.js.
